title: Rolling CVaR Position Budget Enforcement Gate
summary: Computes the portfolio's rolling 95% CVaR using historical simulation over the trailing 60 trading days of equity curve returns. CVaR@95 = average of the worst 5% of daily portfolio returns. If CVaR@95 exceeds a per-user budget (e.g., –2.5% expected daily loss in the tail), new position opens are blocked until the metric recovers. This is distinct from the existing 'Rolling CVaR Dashboard Metric and Per-Account Risk Budget' (which is analytics-only) by adding an actual enforcement gate that prevents order submission. VaR cannot fill this role because it ignores losses beyond the threshold and is not sub-additive across positions.
expected_impact: Provides a mathematically coherent tail-risk cap that prevents new positions from being opened when the portfolio's expected tail loss (CVaR@95) exceeds a configurable budget; CVaR is sub-additive and captures average loss beyond VaR, making it 10–30% more conservative than VaR during stress periods as empirically documented in 2024–2025 research
